How It Works

From concept
to finished visual.

Bring the idea. SLMM Creative helps shape the graphic, product direction, mockup, production path, and content approach so the final piece feels intentional.

01

Concept

Start with the idea, reference, phrase, artwork direction, product type, or brand mood.

02

Design

Build the visual system: graphics, typography, placements, apparel direction, and product mockups.

03

Production

Prepare artwork for DTF and pressing with a focus on wearable, print-conscious execution.

04

Content

Support the launch with photography, video direction, product visuals, and creative production.

Selected Work

Portfolio

Print-ready apparel concepts, product mockups, and visual systems built for brands, artists, businesses, and creators who need finished work that feels intentional.

Founder

Sophia Loren
Marie Moore

Sophia Loren Marie Moore is the founder of SLMM Creative — a multidisciplinary creative studio based in Hilliard, Ohio.

Built from a love of design, art, photography, and creating something from nothing, SLMM Creative helps turn ideas into visuals, products, and brand assets that feel intentional, polished, and ready to move.

The studio works across graphic design, apparel concepts, DTF production, product mockups, brand photography, videography, and other creative production needs for artists, businesses, brands, and creators.

For Sophia, this is one expression of art — a way to build vision into something people can see, wear, and experience.

Sophia L. M. Moore — SLMM
House Brand

SLMM Society

SLMM Society is the house apparel brand within the SLMM Creative world — bold graphic streetwear, women’s cuts, unisex silhouettes, and product-first visual storytelling.

Join the Society
